page.title: Settings
page.noSectionsAvailable: No settings available for your role
page.unsavedChangesPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

imageCropper.title: Crop Your Image
imageCropper.subtitle: Adjust the selection to fit your {{type}}
imageCropper.dragHint: Drag to move, corners to resize
imageCropper.qualityNote: Image will be saved as high-quality JPEG

avatarSection.hint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Image will be cropped to {{width}}×{{height}}px

companyProfile.logoHint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Will be cropped to 256×256px
companyProfile.productCategoriesHint: Select from suggestions or add your own custom categories. Press Enter to add.
companyProfile.serviceCategoriesHint: Select from suggestions or add your own custom categories. Press Enter to add.
companyProfile.otherServiceCategoryHint: Add a custom category and click Add.
companyProfile.deliveryTypeHint: Choose how you deliver your services
companyProfile.bookingLinkHint: You can enter it without https://
companyProfile.websiteHint: You can enter it without https://

educatorProfile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Will be cropped to 256×256px
educatorProfile.roleHint: Add one or more roles to improve matching.
educatorProfile.rolePressEnterHint: Type a role and press Enter to add it.
educatorProfile.citiesHint: Add multiple cities to increase your visibility.
educatorProfile.citiesPressEnterHint: Type a city and press Enter to add it.
educatorProfile.professionalDetailsHint: These fields help foundations find you in the candidate pool.
educatorProfile.locationHint: This helps foundations find you in the candidate pool.
educatorProfile.missingRequiredFields: Please provide both Location and Role before saving your profile.
educatorProfile.shortBioPlaceholder: Tell others about yourself, your experience, and what makes you unique...
educatorProfile.bioHint: This will appear on your public profile
educatorProfile.skillsPlaceholder: e.g., Early Childhood Education, Special Needs, Bilingual
educatorProfile.skillsHint: Type and press Enter to add skills
educatorProfile.workExperienceHint: You can use JSON format or plain text
educatorProfile.educationHint: You can use JSON format or plain text
educatorProfile.certificationsPlaceholder: e.g., CPR Certified, Early Childhood Education Certificate
educatorProfile.certificationsHint: Type and press Enter to add certifications
educatorProfile.cvHint: Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX (Max 5MB). This will be shared with foundations when you apply for jobs.
educatorProfile.confirmDeleteCv: Delete your CV permanently? This cannot be undone.
educatorProfile.deleteCvFailed: Failed to delete CV. Please try again.
educatorProfile.cvUrlHint: Link to your CV or resume document

availability.title: Availability Schedule
availability.subtitle: Set your working schedule so daycares can find you for replacement positions

employmentType.label: Employment Type Preference
employmentType.customScheduleDesc: Available for replacement work with specific hours

weeklySchedule.title: Weekly Schedule
weeklySchedule.subtitle: Set your regular availability for each day

timeSlot.invalid: End time must be after start time

dateOverrides.title: Date Overrides
dateOverrides.subtitle: Mark specific dates as unavailable or add extra hours
dateOverrides.noOverridesHint: Add overrides for holidays, vacations, or extra hours

validation.dateExists: This date already has an override
validation.pastDate: Cannot set override for past dates

notes.title: Additional Notes
notes.placeholder: Add any additional information about your availability (e.g., preferred areas, travel distance, special conditions)...

info.title: How it works
info.description: Your availability is visible to daycares searching for replacement staff. They can filter by days and times you're available to find the perfect match for their needs.

profileDocuments.title: Catalogs & Documents
profileDocuments.supplierDescription: Upload product catalogs, price lists, or company brochures that will be visible on your public profile.
profileDocuments.serviceProviderDescription: Upload service brochures, company profiles, or capability documents that will be visible on your public profile.
profileDocuments.allowedFormats: Allowed: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint. Max size: 50MB
profileDocuments.uploadHint: Upload a catalog or company profile to get started.
profileDocuments.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
profileDocuments.uploadSuccessMessage: Your document has been uploaded successfully.
profileDocuments.uploadFailedMessage: Failed to upload document. Please try again.
profileDocuments.deleteSuccessMessage: The document has been deleted successfully.
profileDocuments.deleteFailedMessage: Failed to delete document. Please try again.
profileDocuments.allowedTypes: Please upload a PDF, Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file.
